name: Uncertainty-Aware Trust Estimation for Multi-LLM Systems via Structured Expert Judgement

description: arXiv:2607.20529v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) ensembles are increasingly used to improve reliability by combining predictions from multiple LLMs. However, existing aggregation methods typically assume that all models are equally trustworthy, overlooking differences in uncertainty quality. This assumption is poorly suited to heterogeneous LLMs, whose reliability an...
author: Jiawei Zheng, Jiazhen Zhang
